name: Yq11_AZFa_AZFb_AZFc_palindromes
description: Y chromosome AZF (azoospermia factor) regions a, b, c in Yq11.22-q11.23. Highly palindromic SD architecture (P1-P5 palindromes of 30-2400 kb at >99.9% intra-palindrome identity). NAHR between inverted palindrome arms and between direct ampliconic repeats causes recurrent AZFa (~792 kb), AZFb (~6.2 Mb), and AZFc (~3.5 Mb) deletions — the major non-Klinefelter genetic causes of male infertility (Sertoli-cell-only syndrome, severe oligozoospermia).

architecture.internal_structure: AZFa: ~792 kb between HERV15yq1 and HERV15yq2 (USP9Y, DDX3Y). AZFb: ~6.2 Mb spanning palindromes P5-P1-proximal (EIF1AY, RPS4Y2, KDM5D, RBMY1). AZFc: ~3.5 Mb of palindromes P1-P3 with b/g amplicons (DAZ1-4, CDY1, BPY2). >99.9% palindrome arm identity.

related_diseases: Gr/gr partial AZFc deletion (low-penetrance fertility effect)
